user.description: Persistent cross-session identity and preferences. Never auto-purged.

workspace.description: Shared project context — architecture decisions, style guides, repo state.

mission.description: Short-lived cache for the active mission. Purged after Mission Packet export.

subagentInjection.description: Subagents never read memory directly. Supr extracts relevant chunks and injects them as a Memory Payload into the subagent prompt.
